description: A premier townhome complex by Mortise Group. This 3-level townhouse features 4 Bedrooms + 4 Bathrooms, contemporary design elements including quartz counters, Frigidaire S/S appliances, gas range, fireplace, wide-plank laminate flooring & airy 9' ceilings. Home is equipped with A/C, built-in Control4 Bluetooth speakers on all floors & central vacuum. Covered patio w/ gas hook-up off the kitchen area is perfect for BBQing + entertaining. Double garage offers epoxy flooring + bonus storage room. EXCEPTIONAL PRIVACY! No neighbours front or back! Lovely fenced backyard. Central location, close to grocery stores, schools, parks, restaurants, & more. Easy access to king George Blvd. Highway 99 & Canada/USA border.
